description: Log in to Moodle (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and configure the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course by adding a new 'Standard forum for general use' named "Clinical Case Study Discussions". Set the subscription mode to 'Forced subscription' and use the description: "Weekly forum for analyzing clinical case studies. Students must post at least one original analysis and reply to two peers each week." Within this new forum, post a discussion topic titled "Week 1: Cellular Respiration Disorder" with the message: "A 45-year-old patient presents with extreme fatigue, muscle weakness, and lactic acidosis. Lab results show impaired mitochondrial function. Discuss: What cellular processes are affected? What are the potential diagnoses? How would you approach treatment?"
